label: Infrastructure stack
description: Which open-source platform underpins the wikified database?

label: Trust mechanic
description: What does "invest reputation in another user" mean concretely?

label: Wikidata federation
description: Should the resource interoperate with Wikidata from day one?

label: Data license
description: Under what licenses are structured data and prose published?
decision: CC0 for structured data; CC-BY-SA 4.0 for prose

label: Hosting model for Hello World
description: Where does the Hello World prototype run?
decision: Self-hosted VPS with a real domain and TLS from day one

label: First wikified table
description: What is the first wikified database table the project hosts?

label: Trust system phasing in Hello World
description: Is the stake-and-slash trust system implemented in the prototype?
decision: No, defer entirely; rely on stock MediaWiki user-group ladder

label: Initial deliverable shape
description: Is the deliverable a documentation set, a running site, or both?
decision: Self-documenting Hello World site (canonical) + GitHub mirror

label: Domain name
description: What domain hosts the live wiki?

label: VPS provider and sizing
description: Which provider hosts the VPS and at what tier?

label: Code license
description: Under what license is the infrastructure code published?

label: Schema mutability
description: May any user add new properties, or is property creation reviewed?

label: Internationalization at launch
description: Is the site multi-language from day one or English-only at first?

label: Initial admin and oversighter set
description: Who holds admin and oversighter rights at launch, and how are they appealed?

label: Anti-abuse posture
description: What edit-rate limits, CAPTCHA, and AI-content detection are in place?

label: Scale targets
description: What user, row, and edit-rate targets define year-1 and year-2 success?

label: User's specific site (Goal ii)
description: What is the topic, schema, and initial content of the target site?
